# Bhoomi Constructions and Rockfall Protection

Website: https://bhoomiconstructions.com/

Bhoomi Constructions and Rockfall Protection is a Pune, Maharashtra based civil engineering and construction contractor. The company provides specialized guniting work, slope stabilization, rockfall protection, rock anchoring, retaining wall work and bungalow construction services across Maharashtra and India.

## Key Services

- Guniting work and shotcrete application
- Slope stabilization
- Rockfall protection
- Rock anchoring
- Retaining wall and surface protection
- Bungalow construction
- Civil engineering project execution

## Service Area

- Pune
- Maharashtra
- India

## Contact

- Address: 29/503 Rambaug Colony, Paud Road, Kothrud, Pune 411038, Maharashtra, India
- Phone: +91 9890174374, +91 9561274374
- Email: info@bhoomigunitingwork.com
